summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-raise action is planned because the job disables those paths. Seed PRs are kept open for their existing maintainer/author/proof workflows except #85183, which the validator requires routing as security-sensitive; linked security-sensitive #85317 is also routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive target must be quarantined outside Clownfish backlog automation with a non-mutating exact-ref route_security action.
Focused active bug-fix PR needing proof/maintainer judgment; keep open.
Useful focused PR but not merge-ready; close/fix/merge paths are disabled, so keep open.
Substantial active PR with addressed review context; keep open for maintainer review.
Focused provider/channel bug fix still needing live proof and maintainer technical judgment; keep open.
Draft, uneditable, non-trivial technical PR; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.

Security-sensitive linked PR must be quarantined outside Clownfish backlog automation.
